message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Adder" as Adder
participant "Value" as Value
participant "Expression" as Expression

User ->> Adder : Start the operation

Adder -> Adder : applyTo

Adder -> Value : getTypeMatrix

Adder -> Expression : getLeftOperand

Adder -> Value : getTypeMatrix

Adder -> Expression : getRightOperand

Adder <- Value : result

@enduml
